JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, JOHN LEWIS - REPORTER: C/C FOR SETT. CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWMAN, DANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 190 O'FARRELL ST, #411 $320.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, UPON PAYMENT OF SUM OF $160.00 ON OR BEFORE 01-DEC-94 PLTF. SHALL CONTINUE THE EVICTION TO 15-DEC-94; UPON PAYMENT OF THE SUM OF $160.00 ON OR BEFORE 15-DEC-94, PLTF. SHALL CONTINUE EVICTION TO 01-JAN-95; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS). WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION BEFORE 01-DEC-94.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
